title: Creamy Filipino Tofu Stir-fry
description: A rich and creamy Filipino tofu dish that's perfect for a weeknight meal, featuring pink food coloring to add color and fermenting for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Dice the tofu into small cubes.
Chop the onion and garlic finely. Peel and grate the ginger.
Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium heat. Add the diced onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger; stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant and slightly softened.
Add the tomato sauce, soy sauce, water, salt, pepper, and pink food coloring to the pan. Stir well until combined, then let simmer for a minute or two.

Add the diced tomatoes, tofu cubes, and enough water to cover the ingredients by about 1 inch (2.5 cm). Bring it to a boil, then reduce heat to low and let cook for about 10 minutes, covered, stirring occasionally.
Adjust seasoning if necessary; add more salt or pepper as needed.
